---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with ARN-Skin
title: 'Bug: <short description>'
labels: bug
assignees: jzbakh
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What happened instead.

## Environment

- ARN-Skin theme: <e.g. `Arn · Mars — Amber Storm`>
- ARN-Skin version: <e.g. `1.0.0`>
- Editor: <e.g. VSCode 1.95.0 / Antigravity IDE / Cursor / Windsurf>
- Operating system: <e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04>

## Screenshot or screen capture

If the bug is visual, attach a screenshot or short capture so the issue is
visible without having to install the theme to reproduce.

## Pre-flight

- [ ] I am running the latest published version of ARN-Skin.
- [ ] I have searched the existing issues and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I reproduced the bug with all other extensions disabled.
